decks.notes: This deck aims to apply early pressure on opponents while disrupting their game plan with cards that tax their resources. By combining aggressive creatures like Ragavan and Phelia with disruptive spells like Consign to Memory and Ephemerate, the deck is able to control the board and dictate the pace of the game. The inclusion of cards like Quantum Riddler and Casey Jones provide additional utility and ways to disrupt opponents. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive game plan while being able to consistently cast the powerful spells in the deck.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own win conditions with powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler. The deck also utilizes versatile removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Solitude to deal with a variety of threats. With plenty of card draw and interaction, this UW Control deck seeks to outlast and outmaneuver opponents, gradually gaining control of the game until it can secure a decisive victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing Birthing Ritual to quickly ramp up mana and play powerful creatures like Abhorrent Oculus, Shardless Agent, and Ice-Fang Coatl. Force of Negation provides protection while cards like Sink into Stupor and Flare of Denial disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Coiling Oracle and Subtlety adds card advantage and control elements to the deck. The Simic color combination allows for a good balance of aggression and control, making it a versatile and formidable deck in Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays using low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, supported by spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart for efficient removal and burn. The deck also includes card draw spells like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble to maintain momentum and consistency. With a low land count and tools like Violent Urge and Slickshot Show-Off to push through damage, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful creatures and applying pressure to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, it aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also includes ways to protect its creatures with cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory. With a mix of aggressive creatures, burn spells, and disruptive elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer, this deck is geared towards a swift victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy involves using cheap creatures like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply pressure early on, while also using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off opponents or control the board. Additionally, cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride provide additional support and buffs to the creatures in the deck. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently through a combination of creature damage and direct burn spells.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively while disrupting opponents' plans with taxing effects. By combining efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and powerful removal spells like Prismatic Ending, the deck aims to control the board and close out games quickly. Cards like Consign to Memory and Quantum Riddler help generate card advantage and disrupt opponents' strategies. By utilizing a mix of aggressive threats and disruptive spells, this deck aims to apply pressure while disrupting opponents' game plans, ultimately leading to a victory through a mix of tempo and disruption.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures to enable powerful plays such as bringing back Vengevines or activating Hollow One. Utilizing cards like Burning Inquiry, Faithless Looting, and Goblin Lore accelerates the process of discarding cards and filling the graveyard. By playing aggressively with creatures like Detective's Phoenix and Marauding Mako, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents. The addition of Lightning Bolt provides removal and reach to close out games. With a mix of powerful creatures and efficient spells, this deck aims to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure to the opponent.

The main idea of this Modern Control - UrzaTron deck is to ramp up mana quickly using the Urza's Tower, Mine, and Power Plant lands in order to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck also features cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to control the board and disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of Karn, the Great Creator allows for access to artifacts like Trinisphere and Vexing Bauble to further disrupt opponents and gain an advantage in the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a variety of counter spells, removal, and combo pieces to control the game and set up for a powerful win condition without needing lands. The deck focuses on utilizing cards that generate value without requiring lands, such as Lotus Bloom and Thundertrap Trainer, while also including powerful combo pieces like Goblin Charbelcher and Tameshi, Reality Architect to finish off the opponent. This deck aims to control the game early on and then quickly assemble its combo pieces for a decisive victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game with powerful Eldrazi creatures and disruptive spells while assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate a massive amount of mana. With cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Chalice of the Void, this deck aims to shut down the opponent's strategies and overwhelm them with big threats like Devourer of Destiny and Sire of Seven Deaths. The efficient use of mana acceleration and card advantage helps to quickly establish board control and secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells, utilizing cards like Ajani, Ragavan, and Phlage to apply pressure early on. The deck also includes ways to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan, with cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ranger-Captain of Eos. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Goblin Bombardment provide additional utility and ways to control the board state. The main goal is to maintain a fast pace and force the opponent to react constantly, ultimately leading to victory.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. With a mix of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, along with direct damage from Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Support cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ranger-Captain of Eos help to provide additional value and card advantage. Overall, the deck's strategy is to maintain pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck utilizes the Allosaurus Rider combo to quickly summon powerful creatures like Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant and Griselbrand. It includes cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to tutor for key pieces, while also running Pact of Negation for protection. The deck also incorporates various mana ramp and control elements to ensure the combo can be executed efficiently. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and powerful creature presence, backed up by card advantage and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent through aggressive plays. By using cards like Kappa Cannoneer, Pinnacle Emissary, and Arcbound Ravager, along with support from Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to build a board presence and put pressure on the opponent early in the game. With access to powerful cards like Urza's Saga and Engineered Explosives, as well as disruptive elements like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt, the deck can control the battlefield and dictate the pace of the game.

The key strategy of this deck is to control the game using a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and powerful creatures like Phelia and Phlage. The deck aims to stall the game, disrupt the opponent's plans, and ultimately outvalue them by playing efficient threats and generating card advantage. Cards like Quantum Riddler and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker help control the board and draw cards, while Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption. Overall, the deck excels at grindy games and is designed to outlast opponents through resource management and strategic plays.
